title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules for effective prompting of Claude Code based on Anthropic engineering practices. The rules cover prompt skills composition, reusability, modularity, and session-based improvement, with the underlying claim that most users apply these incorrectly.
